releaseNotes:
• Feature: when adding a source, http:// is now automatically prepended to M3U URLs that are missing a scheme — no manual correction needed.
• Feature: adding a source now shows a live progress dialog ("Loading channels: 1,200…", "Loading movies: 340…") instead of a plain spinner, giving real-time feedback during source import.
• Feature: new optional EPG URL step in the add-source wizard. Enter your programme guide URL at setup time alongside URL/user/password. If provided, EPG import starts immediately in the background once the source is saved.
